BlueprintSignoff.description:
Typed pointer for 29-3's Irene + writer blueprint sign-off seam.

This is intentionally additive and minimal: one pointer to the original
blueprint draft, one pointer to the sign-off sidecar artifact, two explicit
approval booleans, and one timezone-aware timestamp for when the sign-off
record was captured.

blueprint_asset_path.description: Repo-relative path to the 31-4 blueprint draft artifact that this sign-off record approves.
blueprint_asset_path.title: Blueprint Asset Path

signoff_artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the deterministic Irene+writer sign-off sidecar artifact emitted by Story 29-3.
signoff_artifact_path.title: Signoff Artifact Path

irene_review_complete.description: True once Irene's blueprint review has been recorded.
irene_review_complete.title: Irene Review Complete

writer_signoff_complete.description: True once the human writer has approved the blueprint draft.
writer_signoff_complete.title: Writer Signoff Complete

signed_at.description: Timezone-aware timestamp at which the sign-off pointer was emitted.
signed_at.title: Signed At

BlueprintSignoff.title: BlueprintSignoff

Dials.description:
Operator-set dials for enrichment + corroboration (AC-B.3).

Both dials accept ``None`` (dial unset) or a float in ``[0.0, 1.0]``.
Interaction rules + operator-facing wording documented in ``dials-spec.md``.

enrichment.description: Aspirational enrichment dial: operator-requested depth beyond what the source materials alone could carry. Null = unset.
enrichment.title: Enrichment

corroboration.description: Evidence-bolster dial: operator-requested cross-validation of existing source claims. Null = unset.
corroboration.title: Corroboration

Dials.title: Dials

IdentifiedGap.description: Single gap surfaced by Irene on an in-scope unit (AC-B.3).

suggested_posture.description: Recommended research posture for this gap, aligned to the three operator-memory parameter families: embellish (aspirational enrichment), corroborate (evidence-bolster), gap_fill (derivative-artifact gap-filling).
suggested_posture.title: Suggested Posture

IdentifiedGap.title: IdentifiedGap

LearningModel.description: Hardcoded ``gagne-9`` / version 1 at MVP (John MVP Discipline).
LearningModel.title: LearningModel

PlanUnit.description:
Single plan unit inside the lesson plan (AC-B.2).

``rationale`` is stored verbatim — no parsing, no coercion, no trim
(R1 ruling amendment 16). Empty string is valid (R2 rider S-2).

scope_decision.description: Jurisdictional verdict carried by this plan unit. None is permitted during plan drafting before Maya has weighed in on this unit.

weather_band.description: Abundance-framed source-fitness band. gold = you've got this cold; green = we're in step; amber = your call; gray = Marcus leans in more (proposes additional support, delegation or blueprint, for this unit). Red is forbidden (AC-B.7).
weather_band.title: Weather Band

modality_ref.description: Target modality (e.g. 'slides', 'leader-guide', 'blueprint'). Null unless the scope decision is 'delegated' or 'blueprint'.
modality_ref.title: Modality Ref

rationale.description: Free text, stored verbatim, surfaced verbatim (R1 ruling amendment 16). Accepts any content including the empty string; no min_length; no trimming. R2 rider S-2.
rationale.title: Rationale

blueprint_signoff.description: Optional typed pointer emitted by Story 29-3 when a blueprint draft has been co-authored and signed off by Irene plus the human writer.

PlanUnit.title: PlanUnit

ScopeDecision.description:
Jurisdictional primitive. Maya is the SOLE signatory (AC-C.5 / AC-C.8).

Two-level actor surface (R2 rider S-4):
    - ``proposed_by``: PUBLIC; Literal["system", "operator"]; serializes to
      Maya-facing payloads.
    - ``_internal_proposed_by``: PRIVATE; Literal over the five-valued
      internal taxonomy; ``Field(exclude=True)`` so it DOES NOT appear in
      default ``model_dump`` / ``model_dump_json``. Private-audit tooling
      can opt in by overriding ``exclude``.

State machine:
    - ``proposed -> ratified`` requires ``ratified_by == "maya"``.
    - ``ratified -> locked`` requires the plan-lock trigger (30-3a).
    - ``proposed -> proposed`` permitted (re-propose with different scope).
    - ``locked -> *`` forbidden (terminal).

state.description: Lifecycle state of this scope decision.
state.title: State

scope.description: Jurisdictional verdict for this plan unit.
scope.title: Scope

proposed_by.description: Public actor surface: 'system' when generated by the platform, 'operator' when supplied by the course author.
proposed_by.title: Proposed By

ratified_by.description: Signatory; Literal['maya'] or None. Maya is the sole signatory.
ratified_by.title: Ratified By

locked_at.description: Timestamp at which this decision entered the terminal locked state.
locked_at.title: Locked At

ScopeDecision.title: ScopeDecision
